features.name: Earth Glide
features.description: The xorn can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the xorn doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

features.name: Treasure Sense
features.description: The xorn can pinpoint the location of precious metals and stones within 60 feet of itself.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The xorn makes one Bite attack and three Claw attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 17 (4d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) Slashing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Charge
bonus_actions.description: The xorn moves up to its Speed or Burrow Speed straight toward an enemy it can sense.

tactical_info.tactics: Uses earth glide to ambush from underground. Charge bonus action closes distance quickly. Four attacks per turn (1 bite + 3 claws) make it a damage dealer.
